task_title: Investigative report: are we losing money to dup submits

scores.justification: Agent successfully identified and retrieved the triple-submit cluster o067/o068/o069 with user_id u008, all with total_cents 4999 and timestamps 1-2 seconds apart.
Agent quantified the exposure as 2 duplicate orders at $49.99 each (4999 cents) from the triple-submit, with o068 and o069 refunded while o067 remains paid.

Agent did not provide a specific policy recommendation; the skill document describes the existing 'keep-lowest' convention but the agent never wrote a report with a recommended next action such as implementing idempotency keys, rate-limiting, or a dedup job.

Agent did not write or deliver a 1-page report with a clear yes/no/partial verdict on whether the company is losing money to duplicate submissions; the task explicitly required a written report but none was produced.
